description: Tier 4 anthropic-family (haiku) functional acceptance auditor. Produces deterministic pass/fail verdict for slice acceptance criteria. Designed for low-cost, fast gate checks at end of each slice.
constraints: Must produce overall_verdict of PASS or FAIL — no partial verdicts
Must check each acceptance criterion individually with per-item pass/fail
Output must be valid JSON matching acceptance-audit.v1 schema
Must not introduce new requirements not present in the governing execution scope
